variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the explicit total row 'Cost of revenues/COGS'. The visible production-cost D&A rows look like sub-components of that total, not separate same-level operating rows to be added later. The direct 'Depreciation in Cost of Sales' row is blank.

variables.notes: R:c. Conservative output to avoid double counting. The statement contains duplicate 'Distribution costs', 'Administration costs', and 'Research and development costs' rows, with one presentation apparently including D&A components and a later duplicate apparently excluding them. Because the earlier selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows use those exact duplicate labels without unique identifiers, it is genuinely unclear whether the chosen parent rows already embed the visible D&A components. Under the conservative rule, no separate XSGA D&A rows are added. R&D D&A is also not added because 'Research and development costs' was already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
